title: Diamond Ore Banknotes
description: Changes the display of diamond ore blocks in the inventory to banknotes!
body:
# Diamond ore as banknotes in inventory!
"Diamond Ore Banknotes" is a unique resource pack for Minecraft, designed specifically for servers where diamond ore is the main currency. This resource pack provides players with a unique visual experience to relive the economics of the game by turning ordinary blocks of diamond ore into banknotes.
## Features
* **Unique banknote design.** The banknote textures have been carefully designed with Minecraft in mind. They fit perfectly with the original 16x16 texture resolution and the overall visual language of the game.
* **Preservation of the original block textures.** It is important to note that the resource pack retains the original textures of the diamond ore blocks in the world. This means that on the server you will still see the usual blocks of diamond ore with the old appearance. Only the display in the inventory has been replaced.
## Suitable for servers with an economy based on diamond ore
"Diamond Ore Banknotes" is ideal for servers where diamond ore plays the role of a currency. Thanks to this resource pack, players will be able to more clearly perceive the economic side of the game, visually imagining the value of their assets. This resource pack contributes to deepening into the game world and creating a unique atmosphere where diamonds become a real value.
